title: Hand Range Matrix: Melhorias Visuais e UX
plan: Enhance prepare_range_data() in src/web/data.py to compute heatmap gradient intensity, pass action_breakdown, and calculate min/max net values for color scaling
Add Overall position aggregate tab by combining all position data in the data layer

Update src/web/templates/cash/range.html with: heatmap gradient inline styles, toggle buttons (Dealt/Played/Net$/bb100), filter checkbox, rich tooltip markup, click-to-zoom data attributes, enhanced top hands table with Freq% and Action columns, Overall tab

Add heatmap gradient CSS classes (green-to-red intensity), modal/popup styles for cell zoom, improved legend with visual gradient, responsive layout with horizontal scroll and fixed headers in src/web/static/css/style.css

Implement JavaScript interactivity in src/web/static/js/app.js: toggle filter switching, show/hide played-only filter, cell click modal popup with detailed stats, adaptive font sizing, ESC to close modal
Update tests in tests/test_hand_matrix.py and tests/test_web.py for new gradient calculations, toggle buttons, and template rendering
